title: GitHub - hmanoor/kageops-core: Open-source autonomous AI dev team: Sensei orchestrates specialist agents from idea to shipped product. The engine behind KageOps.
excerpt: Open-source autonomous AI dev team: Sensei orchestrates specialist agents from idea to shipped product. The engine behind KageOps. - hmanoor/kageops-core
content_html:
kageops-core.mp4

An open-source, autonomous AI dev team — from one-line brief to shipped product.

Sensei orchestrates eight specialist agents (the Autonauts) through a full six-phase product lifecycle: discover → design → build → verify → deploy. Runs on your laptop. Zero Docker. Your keys, your code, your machine — with a hard USD kill-switch you control.

Quickstart · How it works · The Autonauts · Why it's different · Open core · Contributing

The 30-second pitch

You describe what you want. Sensei — the orchestrator — decomposes it into tasks and routes each to the specialist best suited for it. Eight agents plan, write code, run the tests, fix what fails, and hand you a built, verified project — with a live activity feed the whole way and a hard budget cap you set.

Not another chat wrapper. KageOps is a real orchestration engine: task decomposition, phase gates, a build gate that actually runs npm install/build/test, an acceptance gate that checks the output against your brief, tiered retry-with-repair, and non-negotiable cost guardrails.

git clone https://github.com/hmanoor/kageops-core.git && cd kageops-core
npm install && npm run build

# The "wow" — preview a full run. Decomposition + routing. Zero AI spend.
npx tsx src/cli/headless-runner.ts --dry-run \
  --name "TaskFlow" \
  --description "A kanban board with drag-and-drop columns and localStorage. Include #board, #add-task, #columns."
👉 What the dry-run prints (click to expand) 
═══ DRY-RUN PLAN (no AI calls, no spend) ═══
  Project:        TaskFlow
  Simple-app:     NO

  Phase plan:
    discovery              full: ~4 task(s)
    poc                    full: ~4 task(s)
    business-viability     full: ~4 task(s)
    design-planning        full: ~4 task(s)
    development            full: ~8 task(s)
    launch-growth          full: ~4 task(s)

  Total tasks:    ~28
  Estimated cost by preset:
    openrouter_budget (DeepSeek/Gemini)      ~$0.13
    ollama (local)                           ~$0.00
═══════════════════════════════════════════

It shows the exact plan Sensei would execute — every phase, every task, and which Autonaut each is routed to — without making a single paid API call.

Ready for real? Point it at a provider and lift the cap:

export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-...            # or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, or Ollama (fully local), …
KAGEOPS_PRESET=openrouter_budget KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD=0.50 \
  npm run run:headless -- --name "TaskFlow" --description "..."

Prefer a GUI? npm run dev launches the Command Center — Mission Control for watching agents work, intercepting tasks, and reviewing output live.

How it works

Sensei never does task work itself — it orchestrates. It decomposes the brief, routes each task to the right specialist, runs the phase gates, and drives the retry-and-repair loop when something fails.

flowchart LR
    B([Your brief]) --> S{{Sensei<br/>orchestrator}}
    S -->|decompose + route| A[8 Autonauts]
    A --> G1{Build<br/>Gate}
    G1 -->|fails| FIX[Forge<br/>repairs] --> G1
    G1 -->|passes| G2{Acceptance<br/>Gate}
    G2 -->|violations| FIX
    G2 -->|passes| OUT([Built + verified project])
    S -.hard USD kill-switch.-> A
Loading

Every project flows through a six-phase lifecycle, each phase gated by your trust level:

flowchart LR
    D[1· Discovery] --> P[2· POC] --> V[3· Business<br/>Viability] --> DP[4· Design<br/>& Planning] --> DEV[5· Development] --> L[6· Launch<br/>& Growth]
Loading

After development, two automated gates run before anything is called "done":

Gate What it does
BuildVerificationGate Runs the real npm install → build → test. No green build, no pass.
AcceptanceGate Checks the output against your brief (required elements, preview-URL reachability), with two-tier MUST/SHOULD severity. On failure it spins a repair task for Forge and retries.

Built with KageOps

Real apps the agents built end-to-end — from a brief to a deployed site:

Project What it is Live
DevPulse A full SaaS — Clerk auth + Stripe billing + Neon Postgres, deployed to Vercel devpulse.kageops.dev
Prism A CSS design toolkit / playground prism.kageops.dev

Meet the Autonauts

Nine specialists. Each an expert in one slice of the lifecycle — because eight sharp tools beat one fuzzy one.

Agent Role Owns
🧭 Sensei Orchestrator Decomposition, routing, phase gates, retries — never writes task code itself
🔍 Scout Strategist Research, discovery, concept briefs, cost estimates
📐 Blueprint Architect System + data design
🎨 Pixel Designer UI / UX
🔨 Forge Engineer Implementation + repair
🔐 Cipher Data specialist Schemas, migrations, data flows
🛡️ Aegis Platform engineer Build, deploy, preview
👁️ Vigil Quality guardian Tests + review
📣 Herald Marketer Copy + launch assets

Why KageOps is different

  • 🛑 Agents that spend money answer to a kill-switch. Every real run requires an explicit KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD cap. A budget poller checks spend every 3s and cancels the run before it blows past. Per-task call caps and a zombie-guard back it up. Always --dry-run first.
  • 🧪 It verifies its own work. The build gate runs your actual toolchain; the acceptance gate checks the output against the brief. Failures trigger a bounded retry-with-repair loop, not a shrug.
  • 🏠 Local-first, zero-Docker. An embedded Postgres (PGlite, WASM) boots in-process on first run. No database to install, no containers, no cloud dependency. Your code never leaves your machine.
  • 🔌 Bring your own provider. Claude (API + CLI), OpenRouter, Ollama (fully local, $0), OpenAI, Gemini — swap with a preset. Your provider bill stays on your own account.
  • 🎛️ Watch and steer. The Command Center desktop app streams a live activity feed; intercept, approve, or redirect tasks as they run.

Multi-provider by design

Provider Mode Cost
Claude API or local CLI Metered / subscription
OpenRouter API (DeepSeek, Gemini, GPT, …) Cheapest metered
Ollama Fully local $0
OpenAI API Metered
Gemini API Metered

Quality — the part nobody else ships

  • 6,300+ tests passing across 290+ files, tsc --strict clean throughout.
  • Deterministic guardrails: budget-kill, per-task caps, zombie-guard, path-traversal prevention on all agent file I/O, parameterized SQL only.
  • CI runs build · test · lint · secret-scan (gitleaks + a home-grown scanner) on every PR.

Architecture

flowchart TB
    subgraph UI[Command Center · Electron]
      CC[Mission Control renderer]
    end
    subgraph ENGINE[Engine · TypeScript]
      SEN[Sensei orchestrator]
      BUS[(Event bus<br/>LISTEN/NOTIFY)]
      AG[Autonaut agents]
      AD[Multi-provider<br/>AI adapter]
      GATES[Build + Acceptance gates]
    end
    subgraph DATA[Local-first data]
      PG[(Embedded PGlite<br/>+ pgvector)]
    end
    CC <--> SEN
    SEN <--> BUS
    BUS <--> AG
    AG --> AD
    SEN --> GATES
    SEN <--> PG
    AG --> PG
Loading
Layer Tech
Desktop app Electron 34 + TypeScript
Engine Sensei orchestrator + 8 agents, event bus (Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY)
Database Embedded PGlite (default) · external Postgres 16 + pgvector (opt-in)
AI Multi-provider adapter (Claude / OpenRouter / Ollama / OpenAI / Gemini)
CLI Headless runner (--dry-run, budget caps, resume)
Tests Vitest · tsc --strict

See docs/architecture/ for the full picture.

What's in this repo (open core)

KageOps is open-core. This repository is the engine and everything you need to run it locally — under AGPL-3.0, free forever:

  • ✅ Sensei orchestrator, the 8 Autonauts, the agent framework
  • ✅ Task decomposition, routing, phase gates, build + acceptance gates
  • ✅ Embedded PGlite database, event bus, headless CLI runner
  • ✅ The Command Center desktop UI
  • ✅ Multi-provider AI adapter + cost guardrails + APO (prompt optimization)

The commercial KageOps Cloud layer — managed cloud compute, team collaboration, hosted identity, billing, and outbound connectors — lives in a separate private repository. The boundary is documented in OPEN-CORE.md, and there are zero open → commercial imports; the engine runs fully standalone. What you pay for is the hosted business, never the engine.

Quickstart

Requires Node 20+. No Docker, no database setup.

git clone https://github.com/hmanoor/kageops-core.git
cd kageops-core
npm install
npm run build

# 1. Preview (no spend)
npx tsx src/cli/headless-runner.ts --dry-run --name "MyApp" --description "..."

# 2. Real run (budget-capped)
export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-...
KAGEOPS_PRESET=openrouter_budget KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD=0.50 \
  npm run run:headless -- --name "MyApp" --description "..."

# 3. Or the desktop Command Center
npm run dev

Cost safety is built in. Real runs require an explicit KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD cap; the budget-kill poller cancels the run if spend approaches it.

Contributing

We'd love your help. Read CONTRIBUTING.md — dev setup, conventional-commit + test-coverage bars, and the one-time CLA sign-off (automated on your first PR). All participation is governed by our Code of Conduct.

Security

Found a vulnerability? Don't open a public issue — see SECURITY.md for private disclosure via GitHub Security Advisories.

Acknowledgments

KageOps is built on ideas from the open-source community. With thanks to:

  • graphify — inspiration + the engine behind the in-app Code Graph (turn any input into a navigable knowledge graph).
  • Agent Lightning (Microsoft) — inspiration for APO, KageOps's opt-in Automatic Prompt Optimization loop.
  • caveman (Julius Brussee) — inspiration for Caveman Mode, our terse agent-to-agent prompting that trims inter-agent tokens ~65%.

These projects shaped how KageOps works; any rough edges are ours, not theirs.

License

AGPL-3.0 © KageOps. Contributions are accepted under the project CLA, which preserves the option to offer KageOps under a commercial license alongside the AGPL open core.

sentences.zh: 每个人都是生命周期某一方面的专家——因为八个锋利的工具胜过一个模糊的工具。

blocks.html_en: Decomposition, routing, phase gates, retries — never writes task code itself

sentences.en: Decomposition, routing, phase gates, retries — never writes task code itself
sentences.zh: 分解、路由、阶段门、重试——从不编写任务代码本身

sentences.en: Research, discovery, concept briefs, cost estimates
sentences.zh: 研究、发现、概念简介、成本估算
为什么 KageOps 与众不同

blocks.html_en: • 🛑 Agents that spend money answer to a kill-switch. Every real run requires an explicit KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD cap. A budget poller checks spend every 3s and cancels the run before it blows past. Per-task call caps and a zombie-guard back it up. Always --dry-run first.

sentences.en: 🛑 Agents that spend money answer to a kill-switch.
sentences.zh: 🛑 花钱的特工会响应终止开关。

sentences.en: Every real run requires an explicit KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD cap.
sentences.zh: 每次实际运行都需要明确的 KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD 上限。

sentences.en: A budget poller checks spend every 3s and cancels the run before it blows past.
sentences.zh: 预算轮询器每 3 秒检查一次支出，并在运行结束之前取消运行。

sentences.en: Per-task call caps and a zombie-guard back it up.
sentences.zh: 每个任务的调用上限和僵尸守卫支持它。

blocks.html_en: • 🧪 It verifies its own work. The build gate runs your actual toolchain; the acceptance gate checks the output against the brief. Failures trigger a bounded retry-with-repair loop, not a shrug.

sentences.en: The build gate runs your actual toolchain; the acceptance gate checks the output against the brief.
sentences.zh: 构建门运行您的实际工具链；验收门根据简报检查输出。

sentences.en: Failures trigger a bounded retry-with-repair loop, not a shrug.
sentences.zh: 失败会触发有限的重试修复循环，而不是耸肩。

blocks.html_en: • 🏠 Local-first, zero-Docker. An embedded Postgres (PGlite, WASM) boots in-process on first run. No database to install, no containers, no cloud dependency. Your code never leaves your machine.

sentences.en: An embedded Postgres (PGlite, WASM) boots in-process on first run.
sentences.zh: 嵌入式 Postgres（PGlite、WASM）在首次运行时在进程中启动。

sentences.en: No database to install, no containers, no cloud dependency.
sentences.zh: 无需安装数据库，无需容器，无需云依赖。

sentences.en: Your code never leaves your machine.
sentences.zh: 您的代码永远不会离开您的机器。

blocks.html_en: • 🔌 Bring your own provider. Claude (API + CLI), OpenRouter, Ollama (fully local, $0), OpenAI, Gemini — swap with a preset. Your provider bill stays on your own account.

sentences.en: Claude (API + CLI), OpenRouter, Ollama (fully local, $0), OpenAI, Gemini — swap with a preset.
sentences.zh: Claude (API + CLI)、OpenRouter、Ollama（完全本地化，0 美元）、OpenAI、Gemini — 与预设交换。

sentences.en: Your provider bill stays on your own account.
sentences.zh: 您的提供商账单保留在您自己的帐户上。

blocks.html_en: • 🎛️ Watch and steer. The Command Center desktop app streams a live activity feed; intercept, approve, or redirect tasks as they run.

sentences.en: The Command Center desktop app streams a live activity feed; intercept, approve, or redirect tasks as they run.
sentences.zh: Command Center 桌面应用程序传输实时活动源；在任务运行时拦截、批准或重定向任务。

blocks.html_en: Quality — the part nobody else ships

sentences.en: Quality — the part nobody else ships
sentences.zh: 质量——没有其他人发货的部件

blocks.html_en: • 6,300+ tests passing across 290+ files, tsc --strict clean throughout.

sentences.en: 6,300+ tests passing across 290+ files, tsc --strict clean throughout.
sentences.zh: 6,300 多个测试通过了 290 多个文件，tsc --严格干净。

blocks.html_en: • Deterministic guardrails: budget-kill, per-task caps, zombie-guard, path-traversal prevention on all agent file I/O, parameterized SQL only.

sentences.en: Deterministic guardrails: budget-kill, per-task caps, zombie-guard, path-traversal prevention on all agent file I/O, parameterized SQL only.
sentences.zh: 确定性护栏：预算终止、每个任务上限、僵尸防护、所有代理文件 I/O 上的路径遍历预防、仅参数化 SQL。

blocks.html_en: • CI runs build · test · lint · secret-scan (gitleaks + a home-grown scanner) on every PR.

sentences.en: CI runs build · test · lint · secret-scan (gitleaks + a home-grown scanner) on every PR.
sentences.zh: CI 在每个 PR 上运行构建·测试·lint·秘密扫描（gitleaks + 国产扫描仪）。

sentences.en: Sensei orchestrator + 8 agents, event bus (Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY)
sentences.zh: Sensei Orchestrator + 8 个代理，事件总线（Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY）
嵌入式 PGlite（默认）·外部 Postgres 16 + pgvector（选择加入）

sentences.en: Multi-provider adapter (Claude / OpenRouter / Ollama / OpenAI / Gemini)
sentences.zh: 多提供商适配器（Claude / OpenRouter / Ollama / OpenAI / Gemini）
无头跑者（——试运行、预算上限、简历）

sentences.en: See docs/architecture/ for the full picture.
sentences.zh: 请参阅 docs/architecture/ 了解完整情况。

sentences.zh: 该存储库是引擎以及您在本地运行它所需的一切 - 在 AGPL-3.0 下，永久免费：

sentences.en: ✅ Sensei orchestrator, the 8 Autonauts, the agent framework
sentences.zh: ✅ Sensei 协调器、8 个 Autonauts、代理框架

blocks.html_en: • ✅ Task decomposition, routing, phase gates, build + acceptance gates

sentences.en: ✅ Task decomposition, routing, phase gates, build + acceptance gates
sentences.zh: ✅ 任务分解、路由、阶段门、构建+接受门

blocks.html_en: • ✅ Embedded PGlite database, event bus, headless CLI runner

sentences.en: ✅ Embedded PGlite database, event bus, headless CLI runner
sentences.zh: ✅ 嵌入式 PGlite 数据库、事件总线、无头 CLI 运行器

blocks.html_en: • ✅ Multi-provider AI adapter + cost guardrails + APO (prompt optimization)

sentences.en: ✅ Multi-provider AI adapter + cost guardrails + APO (prompt optimization)
sentences.zh: ✅ 多提供商AI适配器+成本护栏+APO（及时优化）

blocks.html_en: The commercial KageOps Cloud layer — managed cloud compute, team collaboration, hosted identity, billing, and outbound connectors — lives in a separate private repository. The boundary is documented in OPEN-CORE.md, and there are zero open → commercial imports; the engine runs fully standalone. What you pay for is the hosted business, never the engine.

sentences.en: The commercial KageOps Cloud layer — managed cloud compute, team collaboration, hosted identity, billing, and outbound connectors — lives in a separate private repository.
sentences.zh: 商业 KageOps 云层（托管云计算、团队协作、托管身份、计费和出站连接器）位于单独的私有存储库中。

sentences.en: The boundary is documented in OPEN-CORE.md, and there are zero open → commercial imports; the engine runs fully standalone.
sentences.zh: 边界记录在 OPEN-CORE.md 中，开放→商业进口为零；引擎完全独立运行。

sentences.en: What you pay for is the hosted business, never the engine.
sentences.zh: 您支付的是托管业务，而不是引擎。

blocks.html_en: Requires Node 20+. No Docker, no database setup.

sentences.zh: 没有 Docker，没有数据库设置。

blocks.html_en: Cost safety is built in. Real runs require an explicit KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD cap; the budget-kill poller cancels the run if spend approaches it.

sentences.en: Real runs require an explicit KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD cap; the budget-kill poller cancels the run if spend approaches it.
sentences.zh: 实际运行需要明确的 KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD 上限；如果支出接近预算，预算终止民意调查器就会取消竞选。

blocks.html_en: Cost safety is built in. Real runs require an explicit KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD cap; the budget-kill poller cancels the run if spend approaches it.

sentences.en: Real runs require an explicit KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD cap; the budget-kill poller cancels the run if spend approaches it.
sentences.zh: 实际运行需要明确的 KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD 上限；如果支出接近预算，预算终止民意调查器就会取消竞选。

blocks.html_en: We'd love your help. Read CONTRIBUTING.md — dev setup, conventional-commit + test-coverage bars, and the one-time CLA sign-off (automated on your first PR). All participation is governed by our Code of Conduct.

sentences.zh: 我们希望得到您的帮助。

sentences.en: Read CONTRIBUTING.md — dev setup, conventional-commit + test-coverage bars, and the one-time CLA sign-off (automated on your first PR).
sentences.zh: 阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md — 开发设置、常规提交 + 测试覆盖率条以及一次性 CLA 签核（在您的第一个 PR 上自动执行）。

sentences.en: All participation is governed by our Code of Conduct.
sentences.zh: 所有参与均受我们的行为准则约束。

blocks.html_en: Found a vulnerability? Don't open a public issue — see SECURITY.md for private disclosure via GitHub Security Advisories.

sentences.en: Don't open a public issue — see SECURITY.md for private disclosure via GitHub Security Advisories.
sentences.zh: 不要打开公共问题 - 请参阅 SECURITY.md 通过 GitHub 安全建议进行私人披露。

blocks.html_en: KageOps is built on ideas from the open-source community. With thanks to:

sentences.en: KageOps is built on ideas from the open-source community.
sentences.zh: KageOps 基于开源社区的想法而构建。

blocks.html_en: • graphify — inspiration + the engine behind the in-app Code Graph (turn any input into a navigable knowledge graph).

sentences.en: graphify — inspiration + the engine behind the in-app Code Graph (turn any input into a navigable knowledge graph).
sentences.zh: graphify — 灵感 + 应用内代码图背后的引擎（将任何输入转换为可导航的知识图）。

blocks.html_en: • Agent Lightning (Microsoft) — inspiration for APO, KageOps's opt-in Automatic Prompt Optimization loop.

sentences.en: Agent Lightning (Microsoft) — inspiration for APO, KageOps's opt-in Automatic Prompt Optimization loop.
sentences.zh: Agent Lightning (Microsoft) — APO 的灵感，KageOps 的选择自动提示优化循环。

blocks.html_en: • caveman (Julius Brussee) — inspiration for Caveman Mode, our terse agent-to-agent prompting that trims inter-agent tokens ~65%.

sentences.en: caveman (Julius Brussee) — inspiration for Caveman Mode, our terse agent-to-agent prompting that trims inter-agent tokens ~65%.
sentences.zh: Caveman (Julius Brussee) — Caveman 模式的灵感，我们简洁的代理对代理提示，可将代理间标记减少约 65%。

blocks.html_en: These projects shaped how KageOps works; any rough edges are ours, not theirs.

sentences.en: These projects shaped how KageOps works; any rough edges are ours, not theirs.
sentences.zh: 这些项目塑造了 KageOps 的工作方式；任何粗糙的边缘都是我们的，而不是他们的。

blocks.html_en: AGPL-3.0 © KageOps. Contributions are accepted under the project CLA, which preserves the option to offer KageOps under a commercial license alongside the AGPL open core.

sentences.en: Contributions are accepted under the project CLA, which preserves the option to offer KageOps under a commercial license alongside the AGPL open core.
sentences.zh: CLA 项目接受贡献，该项目保留了在商业许可下与 AGPL 开放核心一起提供 KageOps 的选项。

content_html_zh:
kageops-core.mp4

一个开源、自主的人工智能开发团队——从一行简报到交付的产品。

Sensei 在完整的六阶段产品生命周期中协调八个专家代理（Autonauts）：发现→设计→构建→验证→部署。 在您的笔记本电脑上运行。 零码头工人。 您的钥匙、您的代码、您的机器——通过您控制的硬美元终止开关。

快速入门 · 工作原理 · Autonauts · 为何不同 · 开放核心 · 贡献

30秒的推介

你描述你想要什么。 Sensei（协调者）将其分解为任务，并将每个任务分配给最适合它的专家。 八个代理计划、编写代码、运行测试、修复失败的问题，然后为您提供一个已构建的、经过验证的项目 - 全程提供实时活动反馈以及您设置的硬性预算上限。

不是另一个聊天包装。 KageOps 是一个真正的编排引擎：任务分解、阶段门、实际运行 npm install/build/test 的构建门、根据简短、分层重试修复和不可协商的成本护栏检查输出的验收门。
git clone https://github.com/hmanoor/kageops-core.git && cd kageops-core
npm install && npm run build

# The "wow" — preview a full run. Decomposition + routing. Zero AI spend.
npx tsx src/cli/headless-runner.ts --dry-run \
  --name "TaskFlow" \
  --description "A kanban board with drag-and-drop columns and localStorage. Include #board, #add-task, #columns."
👉 What the dry-run prints (click to expand) 
═══ DRY-RUN PLAN (no AI calls, no spend) ═══
  Project:        TaskFlow
  Simple-app:     NO

  Phase plan:
    discovery              full: ~4 task(s)
    poc                    full: ~4 task(s)
    business-viability     full: ~4 task(s)
    design-planning        full: ~4 task(s)
    development            full: ~8 task(s)
    launch-growth          full: ~4 task(s)

  Total tasks:    ~28
  Estimated cost by preset:
    openrouter_budget (DeepSeek/Gemini)      ~$0.13
    ollama (local)                           ~$0.00
═══════════════════════════════════════════

它显示了 Sensei 将执行的确切计划——每个阶段、每个任务以及每个 Autonaut 被路由到哪个——而无需进行一次付费 API 调用。

准备好了吗？ 将其指向提供商并打开盖子：

export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-...            # or ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, or Ollama (fully local), …
KAGEOPS_PRESET=openrouter_budget KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD=0.50 \
  npm run run:headless -- --name "TaskFlow" --description "..."

更喜欢 GUI？ npm run dev 启动命令中心 — 任务控制，用于观察代理工作、拦截任务和实时查看输出。

它是如何运作的

老师本身从不做任务，而是精心策划。 它分解概要，将每个任务路由给正确的专家，运行阶段门，并在出现故障时驱动重试和修复循环。

flowchart LR
    B([Your brief]) --> S{{Sensei<br/>orchestrator}}
    S -->|decompose + route| A[8 Autonauts]
    A --> G1{Build<br/>Gate}
    G1 -->|fails| FIX[Forge<br/>repairs] --> G1
    G1 -->|passes| G2{Acceptance<br/>Gate}
    G2 -->|violations| FIX
    G2 -->|passes| OUT([Built + verified project])
    S -.hard USD kill-switch.-> A
Loading

每个项目都经历六个阶段的生命周期，每个阶段都由您的信任级别控制：

flowchart LR
    D[1· Discovery] --> P[2· POC] --> V[3· Business<br/>Viability] --> DP[4· Design<br/>& Planning] --> DEV[5· Development] --> L[6· Launch<br/>& Growth]
Loading

开发完成后，在任何事情被称为“完成”之前运行两个自动门：

Gate 它的作用
构建验证门 运行真正的 npm install → build → test。 没有绿色建筑，就没有通行证。
验收门 根据您的简介（必需的元素、预览 URL 可访问性）检查输出，具有两层“必须”/“应该”严重性。 失败时，它会为 Forge 启动修复任务并重试。

使用 KageOps 构建

代理端到端构建的真实应用程序 - 从简介到部署的站点：

项目 它是什么 Live
开发脉冲 完整的 SaaS — Clerk auth + Stripe billing + Neon Postgres，部署到 Vercel devpulse.kageops.dev
Prism CSS 设计工具包/游乐场 prism.kageops.dev

认识机器人

九名专家。 每个人都是生命周期某一方面的专家——因为八个锋利的工具胜过一个模糊的工具。

Agent Role Owns
🧭 老师 协调者 分解、路由、阶段门、重试——从不编写任务代码本身
🔍 Scout 战略家 研究、发现、概念简介、成本估算
📐 蓝图 建筑师 系统+数据设计
🎨 Pixel 设计师 UI / UX
🔨 Forge 工程师 实施+修复
🔐 密码 数据专家 模式、迁移、数据流
🛡️ Aegis 平台工程师 构建、部署、预览
👁️ Vigil 品质守护者 测试+审查
📣 先驱报 营销人员 复制+启动资产

为什么 KageOps 与众不同

  • 🛑 花钱的特工会响应终止开关。 每次实际运行都需要明确的 KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD 上限。 预算轮询器每 3 秒检查一次支出，并在运行结束之前取消运行。 每个任务的调用上限和僵尸守卫支持它。 始终——先进行空运行。
  • 🧪 它验证自己的工作。 构建门运行您的实际工具链；验收门根据简报检查输出。 失败会触发有限的重试修复循环，而不是耸肩。
  • 🏠 本地优先、零 Docker。 嵌入式 Postgres（PGlite、WASM）在首次运行时在进程中启动。 无需安装数据库，无需容器，无需云依赖。 您的代码永远不会离开您的机器。
  • 🔌 带上您自己的提供商。 Claude (API + CLI)、OpenRouter、Ollama（完全本地化，0 美元）、OpenAI、Gemini — 与预设交换。 您的提供商账单保留在您自己的帐户上。
  • 🎛️ 观察和驾驶。 Command Center 桌面应用程序传输实时活动源；在任务运行时拦截、批准或重定向任务。

多提供商设计

提供者 Mode Cost
克洛德 API 或本地 CLI 计量/订阅
开放路由器 API（DeepSeek、Gemini、GPT...） 最便宜的计量
成为 完全本地化 $0
开放人工智能 API 计量
双子座 API 计量

质量——没有其他人发货的部件

  • 6,300 多个测试通过了 290 多个文件，tsc --严格干净。
  • 确定性护栏：预算终止、每个任务上限、僵尸防护、所有代理文件 I/O 上的路径遍历预防、仅参数化 SQL。
  • CI 在每个 PR 上运行构建·测试·lint·秘密扫描（gitleaks + 国产扫描仪）。

建筑学

flowchart TB
    subgraph UI[Command Center · Electron]
      CC[Mission Control renderer]
    end
    subgraph ENGINE[Engine · TypeScript]
      SEN[Sensei orchestrator]
      BUS[(Event bus<br/>LISTEN/NOTIFY)]
      AG[Autonaut agents]
      AD[Multi-provider<br/>AI adapter]
      GATES[Build + Acceptance gates]
    end
    subgraph DATA[Local-first data]
      PG[(Embedded PGlite<br/>+ pgvector)]
    end
    CC <--> SEN
    SEN <--> BUS
    BUS <--> AG
    AG --> AD
    SEN --> GATES
    SEN <--> PG
    AG --> PG
Loading
Layer Tech
桌面应用程序 Electron 34 + TypeScript
引擎 Sensei Orchestrator + 8 个代理，事件总线（Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY）
数据库 嵌入式 PGlite（默认）·外部 Postgres 16 + pgvector（选择加入）
AI 多提供商适配器（Claude / OpenRouter / Ollama / OpenAI / Gemini）
CLI 无头跑者（——试运行、预算上限、简历）
Tests 维泰斯特·tsc--严格

请参阅 docs/architecture/ 了解完整情况。

这个仓库中有什么（开放核心）

KageOps 是开放核心的。 该存储库是引擎以及您在本地运行它所需的一切 - 在 AGPL-3.0 下，永久免费：

  • ✅ Sensei 协调器、8 个 Autonauts、代理框架
  • ✅ 任务分解、路由、阶段门、构建+接受门
  • ✅ 嵌入式 PGlite 数据库、事件总线、无头 CLI 运行器
  • ✅ 命令中心桌面 UI
  • ✅ 多提供商AI适配器+成本护栏+APO（及时优化）

商业 KageOps 云层（托管云计算、团队协作、托管身份、计费和出站连接器）位于单独的私有存储库中。 边界记录在 OPEN-CORE.md 中，开放→商业进口为零；引擎完全独立运行。 您支付的是托管业务，而不是引擎。

快速入门

需要节点 20+。 没有 Docker，没有数据库设置。

git clone https://github.com/hmanoor/kageops-core.git
cd kageops-core
npm install
npm run build

# 1. Preview (no spend)
npx tsx src/cli/headless-runner.ts --dry-run --name "MyApp" --description "..."

# 2. Real run (budget-capped)
export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=sk-...
KAGEOPS_PRESET=openrouter_budget KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD=0.50 \
  npm run run:headless -- --name "MyApp" --description "..."

# 3. Or the desktop Command Center
npm run dev
成本安全是内置的。 实际运行需要明确的 KAGEOPS_MAX_RUN_USD 上限；如果支出接近预算，预算终止民意调查器就会取消竞选。

贡献

我们希望得到您的帮助。 阅读 CONTRIBUTING.md — 开发设置、常规提交 + 测试覆盖率条以及一次性 CLA 签核（在您的第一个 PR 上自动执行）。 所有参与均受我们的行为准则约束。

安全

发现漏洞？ 不要打开公共问题 - 请参阅 SECURITY.md 通过 GitHub 安全建议进行私人披露。

致谢

KageOps 基于开源社区的想法而构建。 感谢：

  • graphify — 灵感 + 应用内代码图背后的引擎（将任何输入转换为可导航的知识图）。
  • Agent Lightning (Microsoft) — APO 的灵感，KageOps 的选择自动提示优化循环。
  • Caveman (Julius Brussee) — Caveman 模式的灵感，我们简洁的代理对代理提示，可将代理间标记减少约 65%。

这些项目塑造了 KageOps 的工作方式；任何粗糙的边缘都是我们的，而不是他们的。

执照
